mapper.update: UPDATE rag_chat_sessions SET title = #{title}, preview = #{preview}, message_count = #{messageCount}, deleted = #{deleted}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
UPDATE rag_chat_sessions SET title = #{title}, manual_title = TRUE, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
UPDATE rag_chat_sessions SET deleted = #{deleted}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE session_id = #{sessionId}
